PRJ.02Research & Documentation

FarmTacker

AI-Based Scheduler for Farming

A dual-platform system pairing a Flutter mobile app for farmers with a React.js/PHP web dashboard for administrators. GPT APIs drive automated task scheduling and AI-powered crop analysis, while a QR code system digitizes harvest and inventory tracking from field to spreadsheet.

FlutterReact.jsPHPGPT APIQR System

PRJ.03Full-Stack

Coastal Care

Barangay 6-A Eco-Trail, Victorias City — 2022

A web app for the mangrove island eco-trail in Barangay 6-A, Victorias City, built to keep visitors informed with news and updates on the site. Includes a fun-facts section about the mangrove ecosystem and a reservation system for the eco-trail's cottages.

HTMLCSSJavaScriptPHP

PRJ.05Full-Stack

Agro Fin

Agricultural Budgeting Tool — 2024

A mobile app that helps farmers plan and track their agricultural budgets, built to make financial planning for a farming season more manageable. Backed by a PHP/MySQL server deployed on HelioHost.

ABOUT

The summary layer

I'm a Front-End Developer and UI/UX Designer who doesn't stop at design. I build it, wire up the backend, and ship it live. My work includes five deployed projects, from an HR system I led as Team Leader to an AI-assisted farming tool I helped ground through research and documentation.

I'm currently Project Manager at Ireply Back Office Inc. and a BSIT student at University of St. La Salle, and the thing I care about most is staying open to learning. Every project so far has taught me something new, and I plan to keep it that way.
